title: Improve error messages for transient HTTP errors
description: When Jira returns transient errors like 503 (Service Unavailable), the current output is a raw curl exit code and stack trace. This is confusing even for the developer who wrote the code, and will be worse for casual users. We should catch these HTTP error codes and display a human-friendly message explaining that the error is temporary and the user should try again later. Note that a 503 can also mean the Jira account has been deactivated due to inactivity — the error message should mention this as a possibility too.
